creator: harlan@pcfb1.pfcs.com
text:
Using 2.2-stable (as of a week ago), if I cd to an NFS-mounted
	directory (on, say, a 2.1.0 box) that contains source code and try to
	build there, the process will hang.  Eventually, "df" will hang, too.

How-To-Repeat: 
	From a reboot, on the 2.2-stable box I just cd to the NFS source
	directory and "make".  It repeatably fails somewhere between compiling
	the 3rd source file and the link phase of exim-1.62, for example.
